title: HACCP Fundamentals
summary: Introduction to HACCP principles within Via Nova operations.
purpose: To ensure all staff understand food safety risk management.

steps.title: Understand HACCP
steps.body: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points is a systematic method of identifying and controlling food safety hazards.

steps.title: Identify Hazards
steps.body: Consider biological, chemical and physical contamination risks.

steps.title: Understand Critical Control Points
steps.body: Recognise process steps where controls are essential.

steps.title: Monitor Controls
steps.body: Follow procedures and record required observations.

steps.title: Escalate Issues
steps.body: Report any food safety concerns immediately.

troubleshooting: Escalate food safety concerns to Quality Assurance immediately.

title: Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP)
summary: Core GMP requirements for all personnel.
purpose: To maintain product quality and food safety.
safety_notes: Follow hygiene and PPE requirements at all times.

steps.title: Maintain Personal Hygiene
steps.body: Wash hands and maintain appropriate cleanliness standards.

steps.title: Wear Appropriate PPE
steps.body: Use required PPE in production areas.

steps.title: Maintain Clean Work Areas
steps.body: Keep production and storage areas tidy.

steps.title: Prevent Contamination
steps.body: Protect products from foreign matter.

steps.title: Follow Procedures
steps.body: Use approved SOPs and work instructions.

troubleshooting: Stop work and notify QA if contamination is suspected.

title: Batch Traceability
summary: Maintaining traceability from raw materials to finished products.
purpose: To support compliance, recalls and quality investigations.

steps.title: Record Raw Material Batches
steps.body: Capture supplier batch information during receival.

steps.title: Record Production Usage
steps.body: Link ingredients to work orders.

steps.title: Record Packaging Materials
steps.body: Capture packaging batch details where applicable.

steps.title: Assign Finished Product Batch Codes
steps.body: Ensure every production batch receives a unique identifier.

steps.title: Retain Documentation
steps.body: Maintain records for audit and recall purposes.

troubleshooting: Investigate any missing batch links immediately.

title: Batch Records
summary: Completion and maintenance of production batch records.
purpose: To provide an accurate record of production activities.

steps.title: Record Materials
steps.body: Document all ingredients and quantities used.

steps.title: Record Processing Information
steps.body: Capture production dates and operator details.

steps.title: Record Quality Results
steps.body: Include ABV, yield and inspection results.

steps.title: Document Deviations
steps.body: Record any unusual events or corrective actions.

steps.title: Review and Approve
steps.body: Ensure records are complete before closure.

risks.prevention: Complete records as work is performed.

troubleshooting: Escalate incomplete records before batch release.

title: Sample Retention Program
summary: Retention and management of production samples.
purpose: To support investigations, complaints and quality reviews.

steps.title: Collect Sample
steps.body: Obtain representative finished product sample.

steps.title: Label Sample
steps.body: Include product, batch and date information.

steps.title: Store Sample
steps.body: Place in designated retention storage.

steps.title: Maintain Register
steps.body: Record retained samples.

steps.title: Dispose When Approved
steps.body: Remove expired samples according to procedure.

troubleshooting: Replace missing retention samples where possible.

title: Product Recall Procedure
purpose: To protect consumers and maintain regulatory compliance.
safety_notes: Escalate immediately upon identification of significant risk.

steps.title: Assess Risk
steps.body: Determine severity and scope of the issue.

steps.title: Identify Affected Batches
steps.body: Use traceability records to identify impacted products.

steps.title: Notify Management
steps.body: Escalate according to recall procedures.

steps.title: Notify Customers
steps.body: Communicate with affected customers and distributors.

steps.title: Recover Product
steps.body: Arrange return or quarantine of affected stock.

steps.title: Conduct Investigation
steps.body: Identify root cause and corrective actions.

troubleshooting: Follow the recall communication plan and maintain records of all actions.
